description: Ephemeral Container Evidence Loss — EphemeralContainerStatus has no lastState field

api_boundary.spec: Kubernetes API v1.32: EphemeralContainerStatus explicitly excludes lastState
api_boundary.explanation: stdout/stderr only accessible via kubectl logs while container is running

payload.spec_exclusion: EphemeralContainerStatus.lastState excluded by Kubernetes API spec

evidence_gap.kubectl_logs_after_exit: Error from server (NotFound): container not found
